commentary_text: The model favors Uzbekistan at 46%, while sportsbooks and crypto markets both strongly back DR Congo at 58–59%, a 34-percentage-point gap on the home-win outcome. The model also assigns the draw substantially higher probability—30%—than either betting venue, which cluster near 23%. These shifts could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news, or form trajectories unavailable to the model since its last update, though the magnitude of disagreement on the DR Congo win is especially pronounced. The dashboard flags this as a signal of potential information asymmetry rather than a judgment on which forecast is sounder.
